title: vLLM: Easy, Fast, and Cheap LLM Serving with PagedAttention
summary: A high-throughput and memory-efficient LLM serving engine. It uses PagedAttention, which partitions the KV cache of LLMs into non-contiguous blocks, mimicking OS virtual memory paging, to achieve zero cache waste.
seller_pitch: Deliver 2x-4x higher throughput than Hugging Face Transformers with zero code changes.
why_it_matters: Saves millions of dollars in LLM hosting costs by maximizing GPU utilization and eliminating memory fragmentation.
build_opportunities: Create dynamic API endpoints that scale worker replicas based on token generation density
Develop client-side prompt routing frameworks optimization
risks: High engineering complexity to adapt to new non-standard model architectures
Cold start latency during dynamic multi-node model loading

verification_status.notes: Outstanding implementation of systems-level optimization. PagedAttention is a revolutionary concept for LLM inference scalability.
